overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character running through a lush overgrown forest with ancient ruins, transitioning through marshy wetlands, and emerging onto a sandy beach at sunset. The journey progresses from dense woodland to open coastal waters with dramatic pink and orange sky lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown forest path with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: running through the forest path carrying a bow, navigating around mossy rocks and ferns

entered.detail: tall crumbling stone tower covered in vines visible through the trees
large wooden pole with red and white painted markings and hanging decorations
massive trees with thick trunks and hanging moss
rocky forest floor covered in green moss and small plants

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dirt path through a dense forest with towering cypress trees and thick undergrowth. Ancient stone ruins and wooden totem structures are visible in the distance, partially obscured by mist and vegetation. The lighting is diffused through the forest canopy.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to shallow water and marsh grass

agents.ego_description: splashing through shallow marsh water while maintaining running pace

entered.detail: murky shallow water covering the ground with visible ripples from movement
tall reeds and aquatic grasses growing at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a marshy area where the forest floor gives way to shallow water. Tall reeds and aquatic plants line the path while cypress trees recede into the background. The ground becomes increasingly wet until fully submerged in the lagoon.

events.description: game UI popup appears indicating discovery of new machine site location
transition from enclosed lagoon to open beach shoreline with ocean waves

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep water toward the open horizon and setting sun

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible sandy bottom and tree reflections
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon
dramatic sky filled with pink and purple clouds backlit by the setting sun

segments.scene_description: The character moves through clear shallow lagoon water as the forest opens up to reveal a vast sky filled with dramatic sunset colors. Distant mountains appear on the horizon. A game notification briefly appears on screen as the character approaches the beach transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with ocean waves at sunset

agents.ego_description: running along the wet sand at the water's edge as waves wash ashore

entered.detail: wet sand reflecting the sunset colors with ripples from receding waves
gentle rolling waves breaking on the shore with white foam
rocky outcroppings extending into the water along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a sandy beach with the ocean stretching to the horizon. Waves roll in from the left as the sun sets directly ahead, casting a golden-pink glow across the water and wet sand. The scene opens to a vast coastal vista with distant headlands visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, misty forest that gradually opens into a vast coastal vista at sunset. It begins with a character running along a dirt path beneath a canopy of towering cypress trees, passing ancient stone ruins and wooden totems partially obscured by vegetation. As the forest floor gives way to shallow water, the scene shifts into a marshy area where tall reeds line the path and the ground becomes fully submerged in a lagoon. The environment then expands as the character moves through clear water toward a horizon of distant mountains, while the diffused forest light transforms into a dramatic sky of sunset colors. Finally, the camera emerges onto a sandy beach where waves roll in from the left and the setting sun casts a golden-pink glow across the ocean and wet sand.
